title: トゥルーエンディング

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> has made amazing strides
these past few years, earning us both a
well-deserved break.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer <username>?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Next time you have a day off, would you... like to
spend some time together?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: There's somewhere that I want to take you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Here we are! It's a hot spring hotel!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
What an amazing building! There are so many
kinds of baths here. I'm looking forward to all
their different effects!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can barely contain myself!
choice_data_list:
What made you want to go to a hot spring all of
a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I want to invite Meek here to celebrate three
years of our working together, but I figured I
should do some preliminary research first.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I can't look like I have no idea what I'm doing in
front of her, you know?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, the hot water felt great! I'm starting to
regret only doing a day trip.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Did you try out the flower bath?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The hot water combined with the jasmine
fragrance was incredibly relaxing!
choice_data_list: I bet Meek would love that too.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah. She definitely would!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm feeling a bit dizzy after all those baths.
Could we take a walk outside?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... I knew the cool air would make me feel
better.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: You know... Meek and I...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, sorry... Whenever I think of Umamusume,
there's something that always comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume and their trainers must always work
in tandem.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We've struggled so much to get where we are...
but it wasn't just the two of us the whole time...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
There were many people who walked by our side,
providing support and watching over us...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Delivering their feelings to us with hopeful eyes.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The Trainer's Handbook never mentioned this,
but... the support of others really is important to
a racer's growth...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And that's just one of the lessons I learned in
these last three years.
choice_data_list: Maybe you should write it all down.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hey... You're right. That's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I've also learned much from you,
Trainer <username>.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
As a rival and as a friend, you've taught me so
many things that I didn't know.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And as a trainer, it feels like my worldview has
been broadened considerably thanks to you.
choice_data_list: I feel the same way about you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, in that case... we both helped each
other out, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
With all that I've learned, I want to write my own
Trainer's Handbook now.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'll include everything from the past three
years—the successes, the failures, and so much
more.
choice_data_list: Have you thought of your opening line?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Not yet. Hmmm... How about...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
"Find yourself a lifelong rival—a supporter you
can cheer on... and a helper you can be there for."
